The present invention also relates to the use of polyhomoarginine comprising 6-26 homoarginine residues or a pharmaceutically acceptable salt thereof in a formulation or in a contact lens.

title: METHOD FOR PROMOTING THE GROWTH OF MICROALGAE BY MEANS OF NANOPLASTICS
assignee: UNIV MEXICO NAC AUTONOMA [MX]; UNIVERSIDAD NACIONAL AUTÓNOMA DE MÉXICO
inventors: RODRIGUEZ HERNÁNDEZ ANA GUADALUPE [MX]; MAGDALENO ESQUER SHEILA SORAYA [MX]; VÁZQUEZ DUHALT RAFAEL [MX] et al.
matched_tags: Bioplastic PLA PHA food packaging
abstract: The present invention relates to a process for improving the growth of microalgae in controlled crops, for biotechnological applications. The process for promoting said growth consists in the administration of plastic or bioplastic nanoparticles in a concentration of 5 and 100 micrograms per milliliter, this as a supplement to microalgae cultures under the usual conditions that a person skilled in the art knows and manages routinely.

title: Environment-friendly degradable antibacterial tough polylactic acid-based elastic fiber and preparation method thereof
assignee: JIXIANG SANBAO HIGH TECH NEW MAT CO LTD; 吉祥三宝高科新材料有限公司
inventors: ZHANG LI; MA XIAOFEI; ZHANG ZHICHENG et al.
matched_tags: Bioplastic PLA PHA food packaging
abstract: The invention provides an environment-friendly degradable antibacterial tough polylactic acid-based elastic fiber and a preparation method thereof, and relates to the technical field of fiber materials, the environment-friendly degradable antibacterial tough polylactic acid-based elastic fiber comprises the following components by mass: 55-80 wt% of polylactic acid, 13.7-17.5 wt% of polyhydroxyalkanoate, 0.5-5 wt% of a metal antibacterial agent, 5-20 wt% of a thermoplastic polyurethane elastomer, and 0.8-2.5 wt% of a star hyperbranched compatibilizer; the molecular structure of the star-shaped hyperbranched compatilizer comprises a polylactic acid oligomeric chain segment, a polyethylene glycol chain segment and a catechol group; the PLA provides the degradability and basic strength of the matrix; pHA enhances toughness, degradability and processability; the metal antibacterial agent is endowed with an efficient and broad-spectrum antibacterial function; the thermoplastic polyurethane elastomer contributes to excellent elasticity and flexibility, and the star hyperbranched compatilizer improves the compatibility of the fiber system; all the components have a synergistic effect under the proportion, and a multifunctional foundation of an antibacterial function, good elasticity and environment-friendly degradability is laid for the fiber.

title: SUSTAINABLE TUBULAR CONTAINER FOR CONSUMER PRODUCTS
assignee: VERITIV PACKAGING SOLUTIONS [US]; VERITIV PACKAGING SOLUTIONS
inventors: BRADLEY CHRIS [US]; CRARER ALAN [US]; TILLEY JEFF [US] et al.
matched_tags: Bioplastic PLA PHA food packaging
abstract: A sustainable tubular container that is fully recyclable by curbside recycling, repulpable and home compostable and is easy to use, prevents undesired leakage of the consumer product material, can withstand repetitive usage, and overcomes deficiencies of existing all paper consumer product container systems. The tubular container is primarily paper based that may be recycled easily in the existing paper recycling stream with minimal non-paper parts that also are easily biodegradable, recyclable curbside or home compostable. Such a consumer product container preferably is made of paper-based materials with an inner liner or a coating and otherwise, it is made of PHA, PHB and/or other compostable moldable materials.

title: METHOD FOR PRODUCING RECYCLED PELLETS
assignee: DAIKIN IND LTD [JP]; ダイキン工業株式会社
inventors: YAMAMOTO YUKARI [JP]; MURAKAMI SHINJI [JP]; KATO TAKETO [JP] et al.
matched_tags: Bioplastic PLA PHA food packaging
abstract: Provided is a method for producing recycled pellets that include a fluoropolymer including at least one kind of fluorinated ether monomer units selected from the group consisting of perfluorinated vinyl ether units and perfluorinated allyl ether units, the method comprising melt-molding a molded body comprising the fluoropolymer at a temperature not lower than the melting point of the fluoropolymer to produce pellets and heat-treating the pellets at a temperature lower than the melting point of the fluoropolymer to produce recycled pellets.

title: METHOD FOR PRODUCING RECYCLED PULP FIBERS DERIVED FROM USED ABSORBENT ARTICLE AND RECYCLED PULP FIBERS DERIVED FROM USED ABSORBENT ARTICLE
assignee: UNICHARM CORP [JP]; ユニ・チャーム株式会社
inventors: KONISHI TAKAYOSHI [JP]; KINOSHITA AKIYOSHI [JP]; KURITA NORITOMO [JP] et al.
matched_tags: Bioplastic PLA PHA food packaging
abstract: Provided is a method for producing recycled pulp fibers derived from a used absorbent article, which has high safety and a high cleaning effect. This method for producing recycled pulp fibers derived from a used absorbent article comprises a dehydration and cleaning step (S3) and separation steps (S5, S7). The dehydration and cleaning step dehydrates pulp fibers of a used absorbent article by stirring a mixture liquid obtained by mixing: a mixture which contains the pulp fibers; and a treatment liquid which contains a nonflammable hydrophobic organic solvent and a hydrophilic organic solvent and/or water. The separation steps separate the pulp fibers from the mixture liquid.

title: METHOD FOR PRODUCING RECYCLED MEMBER DERIVED FROM USED ABSORBENT ARTICLES, AND RECYCLED MEMBER DERIVED FROM USED ABSORBENT ARTICLES
assignee: UNICHARM CORP [JP]; ユニ・チャーム株式会社
inventors: KONISHI TAKAYOSHI [JP]; KINOSHITA AKIYOSHI [JP]; KURITA NORITOMO [JP] et al.
matched_tags: Bioplastic PLA PHA food packaging
abstract: Provided is a method for producing a recycled member derived from used absorbent articles, that is highly safe and provides a high cleaning effect. This method for producing a recycled member derived from used absorbent articles comprises a dehydration/washing step (S3) and separation steps (S5, S7). The dehydration/washing step includes stirring a mixed liquid obtained by mixing a mixture, which contains a plastic material, a superabsorbent polymer, and pulp fibers of used absorbent articles, and a treatment liquid, which contains a non-flammable hydrophobic organic solvent and a hydrophilic organic solvent and/or water, to dehydrate the superabsorbent polymer and the pulp fibers. The separation step includes separating at least one of the plastic material, the superabsorbent polymer, and the pulp fibers from the mixed liquid.

title: METHOD FOR PRODUCING RECYCLED SUPERABSORBENT POLYMER DERIVED FROM USED ABSORBENT ARTICLES AND RECYCLED SUPERABSORBENT POLYMER DERIVED FROM USED ABSORBENT ARTICLES
assignee: UNICHARM CORP [JP]; ユニ・チャーム株式会社
inventors: KONISHI TAKAYOSHI [JP]; KINOSHITA AKIYOSHI [JP]; KURITA NORITOMO [JP] et al.
matched_tags: Bioplastic PLA PHA food packaging
abstract: Provided is a method for producing a recycled superabsorbent polymer derived from used absorbent articles, wherein the method has high safety and high washing effectiveness. This method for producing a recycled superabsorbent polymer derived from used absorbent articles includes: a dehydration and washing step (S3); and separation steps (S5, S7). In the dehydration and washing step, a mixed liquid is stirred to dehydrate a superabsorbent polymer, the mixed liquid being formed by mixing: a mixture that contains a superabsorbent polymer of used absorbent articles; and a processing liquid that contains at least a non-flammable hydrophobic organic solvent, a hydrophilic organic solvent, or water. In the separation steps, the superabsorbent polymer is separated from the mixed liquid.

title: RECYCLED RAW MATERIAL COMPOSITION COMPRISING BIS(2-HYDROXYETHYL) TEREPHTHALATE, AND PREPARATION METHOD THEREFOR
assignee: SK CHEMICALS CO LTD [KR]; 에스케이케미칼 주식회사

abstract: This method for preparing a recycled raw material composition, comprising a step of adding an adsorbent in portions according to the composition of chromophores remaining in a bis(2-hydroxyethyl) terephthalate solution obtained by depolymerizing waste polyester, maximizes adsorption efficiency, and thus enables removal of chromophores to a level that is difficult to achieve through removal with a single adsorption.

title: FOAMABLE COMPOSITION WITH ETHYLENE-VINYL ACETATE RECYCLED FOAM AND FOAM ARTICLE MADE THEREFROM
assignee: DOW GLOBAL TECHNOLOGIES LLC [US]; DOW GLOBAL TECHNOLOGIES LLC
inventors: BUENO FERNANDA BORTOLANE [BR]; BUENO, Fernanda Bortolane
matched_tags: Bioplastic PLA PHA food packaging
abstract: Embodiments are directed to a foamable composition comprising virgin ethylenevinyl acetate, greater than or equal to 15 phr ethylene-vinyl acetate recycled foam, elastomer, polarity modifier, a crosslinking agent, and a blowing agent. The elastomer comprises ethylene/alpha-olefin multi-block interpolymer, ethylene/alpha-olefin copolymer, or combinations thereof. The polarity modifier comprises ethylene-alkyl (meth)acrylate copolymer. Further embodiments are directed to foam articles comprising the foamable composition and processes for manufacturing the foam articles.

assignee: UNICHARM CORP [JP]; ユニ・チャーム株式会社

matched_tags: Bioplastic PLA PHA food packaging
abstract: Provided is a method for producing a recycled member derived from used absorbent articles. The method is highly safe and provides a high cleaning effect. The method for producing a recycled member derived from used absorbent articles comprises a dehydration/washing step (S3) and separation steps (S5, S7). The dehydration/washing step includes stirring a mixed liquid obtained by mixing a mixture, which contains a plastic material, a superabsorbent polymer, and pulp fibers of used absorbent articles, and a treatment liquid, which contains a non-flammable hydrophobic organic solvent and a hydrophilic organic solvent and/or water, to dehydrate the superabsorbent polymer and the pulp fibers. The separation step includes separating at least one of the plastic material, the superabsorbent polymer, and the pulp fibers from the mixed liquid.

title: METHOD FOR RECOVERING SILICON FROM END-OF-LIFE PHOTOVOLTAIC MODULE, ANODE ACTIVE MATERIAL FOR SECONDARY BATTERY COMPRISING RECYCLED SILICON RECOVERED THEREBY, AND SECONDARY BATTERY INCLUDING SAME
assignee: HYUNDAI CORP [KR]; 현대코퍼레이션 주식회사
inventors: JUNG JAE YEOB [KR]; KIM KWANG MIN [KR]; LEE HYE JEOUNG [KR] et al.
matched_tags: Bioplastic PLA PHA food packaging
abstract: The present invention relates to a method for recovering silicon from an end-of-life photovoltaic module, an anode active material for a secondary battery comprising recycled silicon recovered thereby, and a secondary battery including same. The method for recovering silicon from an end-of-life photovoltaic module of the present invention comprises the steps of: emitting light to an end-of-life photovoltaic module to extract a solar cell containing 80 to 95 wt% of silicon; improving the purity of silicon to 95.01 to 99.99 wt% through an acid treatment process; and pulverizing same to a micro level in order to recycle the silicon as an anode active material for a secondary battery. Also, provided are an anode active material comprising, together with graphite, 5 to 30 wt% of the recycled silicon recovered by the method, and a secondary battery having same applied thereto and exhibiting a high initial capacity of 1,000 mAh/g or more and stable lifespan characteristics.

title: POLYESTER RESIN COMPOSITION AND RESIN MOLDED ARTICLE
assignee: POLYPLASTICS CO [JP]; ポリプラスチックス株式会社
inventors: SAITO ITSUKI [JP]; 斎藤　樹
matched_tags: Bioplastic PLA PHA food packaging
abstract: A polyester resin composition comprising a polybutylene terephthalate resin, a recycled polyethylene terephthalate resin, a transesterification inhibitor, and a flame retardant, wherein the amount of terminal hydroxyl groups in the polybutylene terephthalate resin is 30-70 mmol/kg, with respect to the total amount of the polybutylene terephthalate resin and the recycled polyethylene terephthalate resin.

title: ABSORBENT ARTICLE FOR PETS
assignee: UNICHARM CORP [JP]; ユニ・チャーム株式会社
inventors: PUSPITASARI VINA [ID]; ICHIKAWA MAKOTO [JP]; プスピタサリ　フィナ et al.
matched_tags: Bioplastic PLA PHA food packaging
abstract: An absorbent article for pets according to one embodiment comprises: a body part which includes a front surface sheet disposed on the skin surface side, a back surface sheet disposed on the non-skin surface side, and an absorber disposed between the front surface sheet and the back surface sheet, and which has an abdominal side region that covers the abdominal part of a pet when worn, a back side region that covers the back part of the pet when worn, and a crotch region disposed between the abdominal side region and the back side region in the longitudinal direction; a target part provided on the non-skin surface side of the back side region of the body part; and a pair of fastening tabs provided in the abdominal side region of the body part and that engage with the target part. The body part includes a pair of back-side flap portions protruding outward in the width direction perpendicular to the longitudinal direction in the back-side region. At least a part of the target part extends in the width direction between side edges in the width direction of the pair of back-side flap portions so as to cross the entire region of the back side region in the width direction.

title: METHOD FOR REUSING POLYURETHANE MATERIALS
assignee: RE SPORT S R L [IT]; RE-SPORT S.R.L.
inventors: NANNI ALESSANDRO [IT]; NANNI, Alessandro
matched_tags: Bioplastic PLA PHA food packaging
abstract: Method for reusing polyurethane-based materials starting from articles or materials to be recycled. The method provides at least to dissolve a polyurethane fraction of such articles or materials in a polar solvent, thus obtaining a diluted polyurethane solution.

title: RECYCLABLE ERGONOMIC SEAT
assignee: MIEN COMPANY [US]; MiEN Company
inventors: BERGSMA REMCO [US]; LEVIN AVRON [US]; Bergsma, Remco et al.
matched_tags: Bioplastic PLA PHA food packaging
abstract: [0000]    A seat includes a cushion structure having an inner foam layer including polyethylene foam and an outer cushion layer including recycled carpet fiber material. A removable outer covering encases the cushion structure. The outer covering includes an upper section and a lower section joined by a releasable fastener. The lower section includes a non-slip surface that extends up a portion of the sides of the seat. The inner foam layer may include a plurality of foam layers stacked atop one another. The outer cushion layer may include a top layer, a bottom layer, and a sleeve that surrounds the sides of the inner foam layer. The sleeve may be formed from a rectangular sheet of recycled carpet fiber material with opposed ends secured together to form a continuous loop.

title: CHARGE SWITCHABLE FILTRATION MEMBRANE, POLYMERIC ADDITIVE, POLYMER BLEND, AND KIT FOR MANUFACTURING SAME, METHODS OF MANUFACTURING AND OF USE
assignee: SOCPRA SCIENCES ET GENIE SEC [CA]; SOCPRA SCIENCES ET GÉNIE S.E.C.
inventors: FARNIA FARHAD [CA]; ZHAO YUE [CA]; ZAMANIAN NILOOFAR [CA] et al.
matched_tags: Bioplastic PLA PHA food packaging
abstract: A filtration membrane comprising a hydrophobic host polymer and a polymeric additive dispersed within the host polymer is provided. The membrane and the polymeric additive undergo reversible transitions of their charge from positive to neutral to negative. The polymeric additive is an amphiphilic block copolymer comprising a hydrophobic block and a hydrophilic block comprising repeat units bearing positively ionizable weak base and negatively ionizable weak acid functional groups. A polymer blend, a kit, and a method for manufacturing the membrane relying on phase inversion via immersion precipitation are provided. Use of the membrane for filtering a feed is also provided. It advantageously uses membranes that have an isoelectric point that is about that of a contaminant and/or foulant to be removed, which involves tuning the isoelectric point of the membrane by adjusting the ratio of repeat units bearing positively ionizable weak base and negatively ionizable weak acid functional groups.

title: TECHNOLOGICAL PROCESS FOR OBTAINING ANTICARIES CHEWING GUM BASED ON A BLEND OF OILS AND PLANT EXTRACTS
assignee: TASSO DE OLIVEIRA ALVES GERMANO [BR]; TASSO DE OLIVEIRA ALVES, Germano
inventors: TASSO DE OLIVEIRA ALVES GERMANO [BR]; TASSO DE OLIVEIRA ALVES, Germano

abstract: The present invention relates to the field of food processing, with emphasis on the production of chewing gum with anticaries properties, using a blend of: chamomile oil (Chamomilla Recutita Flower Oil), lemon balm extract (Melissa Officinalis Leaf Extract), rosemary extract (Rosmarinus Officinalis Extract), clove extract (Eugenia Caryophyllus (Clove) Flower Extract), eucalyptus oil (Eucalyptus Globulus Leaf Oil), thyme essential oil (Thymus Vulgaris Flower/Leaf Oil), black jack seed extract (Bidens Pilosa Extract), mugwort extract (Artemisia Vulgaris Extract), malic acid (Malic acid), citric acid (Citric Acid), activated charcoal (Charcoal Powder), glycerol, xylitol, maltitol, powdered flavouring, anti-humectant and gum base. The invention also relates to products for promoting oral health.

The methods can include extruding a polymer composition, optionally with a masterbatch, wherein the polymer composition and/or the masterbatch comprises a fluorine-free PPA to make a polymeric film. The PPA comprises a mixture of one or more polyamides and one or more polyphosphites.

title: PROTON CONDUCTOR FOR ELECTROLYTE MEMBRANE OF SOLID POLYMER FUEL CELL, ELECTROLYTE MEMBRANE FOR SOLID POLYMER FUEL CELL, MEMBRANE ELECTRODE ASSEMBLY, SOLID POLYMER FUEL CELL, MANUFACTURING METHODS THEREFOR, AND PROTON CONDUCTOR FOR ELECTROLYTE MEMBRANE OF SOLID POLYMER WATER ELECTROLYSIS DEVICE
assignee: UNIV YAMAGATA NAT UNIV CORP [JP]; OJI HOLDINGS CORP [JP]; 国立大学法人山形大学 et al.
inventors: MASUHARA AKITO [JP]; MATSUO YOSHIMASA [JP]; KOYANAGI HINAKO [JP] et al.
matched_tags: Bioplastic PLA PHA food packaging
abstract: The present invention relates to: a proton conductor for an electrolyte membrane of a solid polymer fuel cell, the proton conductor making it possible to obtain an electrolyte membrane for a solid polymer fuel cell, the electrolyte membrane having excellent proton conductivity at high temperatures and being unlikely to decrease in proton conductivity at high temperatures; an electrolyte membrane for a solid polymer fuel cell, the electrolyte membrane containing said proton conductor; a membrane electrode assembly having said electrolyte membrane for a solid polymer fuel cell; a solid polymer fuel cell having said membrane electrode assembly; manufacturing methods for a proton conductor for an electrolyte membrane of a solid polymer fuel cell, an electrolyte membrane for a solid polymer fuel cell, a membrane electrode assembly, and a solid polymer fuel cell; and a proton conductor for an electrolyte membrane of a solid polymer water electrolysis device.　This proton conductor for an electrolyte membrane of a solid polymer fuel cell contains the following component (A) and component (B).　Component (A): fine fibrous cellulose having a fiber width of 1,000 nm or less. Component (B): a polymer compound having one phosphorus oxoacid group.

L’invention concerne un dispositif de doigt de préhension permettant d’améliorer les chances de préhension d’un échantillon solide de forme complexe, réalisé par un préhenseur mécanique.  Il est constitué d’un bâti (1) ; via des liaisons pivots, sont fixés : la biellette souple (2) et la biellette rigide (4). Le patin (3) est relié par pivots aux biellettes (2) et (4). La biellette de transmission de force (5) est reliée à la biellette (4) ainsi qu’à l’actionneur linéaire d’axe (O,). La mise en mouvement de la biellette (4) engendrée par la biellette (5) conduit le patin (3) au contact de l’échantillon, provoquant la déformation en compression de la biellette souple (2) et influençant la répartition de la force de préhension du patin sur la surface de l’échantillon. abstract: This invention provides a new method of lifting pipe. Three points of contact are used on the inside of the pipe, roughly in the shape of an isosceles triangle. Handles are added for workers to manually lift, carry, and manipulate pipe around a job-site. The triangular lifting method is achieved by a horizontal bar with stoppers on each end, and another stopper shooting off its bottom. Another purpose of the present invention is to provide a coating layer and a film that are formed using said curable resin composition. The present invention is a curable resin composition that contains a curable resin, a coupling agent, and a polymerization initiator. The curable resin includes a curable resin that has two or more epoxy groups per molecule and is free of aromatic rings. The coupling agent includes a coupling agent that has one glycidyl group per molecule. The amount of the coupling agent that has one glycidyl group per molecule is 10-50 parts by mass per 100 total parts by mass of the curable resin as a whole and the coupling agent as a whole.

The metal coating layer includes a plurality of unit cells having a polygonal shape and repeatedly arranged in rows and columns, and each of the plurality of unit cells includes patterns formed by partially removing the metal coating layer. The patterns include: a shielding pattern that forms a shielding region including the center of the unit cell in order to block electromagnetic waves in a specific frequency band; and a transmission pattern that is formed in a transmission region, which is a region of the unit cell other than the shielding region, in order to transmit electromagnetic waves in frequency bands other than the specific frequency band.

abstract: [0000]    A wafer structure comprises a semiconductor wafer having a first side opposite a second side in a longitudinal direction. The wafer structure also comprises active circuitry formed on the first side of the semiconductor wafer. The active circuitry demarcates a voltage boundary between a first voltage zone and a second voltage zone in the semiconductor wafer. The wafer structure further includes an insulation layer including an insulation coating and an insulation barrier. The insulation coating is formed on the second side of the semiconductor wafer and extends to an insulation surface in the longitudinal direction. The insulation barrier extends from the insulation surface to the first side of the semiconductor wafer at the voltage boundary. The wafer structure yet further includes a conductive coating layer formed proximate to the insulation surface of a conductive coating material.

The additive contains an organic ammonium salt composed of (A) an amine compound and (B) an acid, wherein the amine compound (A) is represented by formula (I) or (II). abstract: The present invention relates to a method for manufacturing flexible polyurethane foam having a coating layer formed thereon, the coating layer being formed on polyurethane foam (PUF). Moreover, as the coating layer further comprises a urushiol extract, the present invention has remarkable effects including minimal alteration of the physical properties of the polyurethane foam, excellent antibacterial properties, enhanced far-infrared radiation, superior deodorization, odor reduction, and dehumidification capabilities, as well as heat-storage and heat-generation properties.

abstract: The invention relates to a four-layer metal oxide/metal/metal/metal oxide coating that provides multispectral camouflage. Said coating having camouflage characteristics provides thermal, multispectral and electromagnetic protection by offering reflection, absorption and transmission properties against infrared (IR), ultraviolet (UV) and electromagnetic waves. As the ceramic layer, it comprises titanium dioxide (TiO₂), titanium nitride (TiN), zinc oxide (ZnO), zinc nitride (Zn₃N₂), iron (III) oxide (Fe₂O₃), iron (II) oxide (FeO), iron nitride (Fe₂N), aluminium oxide (Al₂O₃), aluminium nitride (AlN), tin oxide (SnO₂), magnesium oxide (MgO), magnesium nitride (Mg₃N₂), calcium oxide (CaO), calcium nitride (Ca₃N₂), cobalt oxide (CoO), tungsten oxide (WO₃), vanadium oxide (V₂O₅), vanadium nitride (VN), manganese oxide (MnO₃), chromium oxide (Cr₂O₃), chromium nitride (CrN), nickel oxide (NiO), boron oxide (B₂O₃), boron nitride (BN) or barium oxide (BaO). As the metal layer, copper (Cu), aluminium (Al), nickel (Ni), cobalt (Co), silver (Ag), gold (Au), iron (Fe), tungsten (W), tin (Sn), zinc (Zn), magnesium (Mg), vanadium (V), chromium (Cr), lead (Pb) or platinum (Pt) is used to provide protection against thermal cameras and UV rays, while electromagnetic waves are blocked. The adhesive-free layered structure is resistant to wear and provides versatile protection for military clothing and mobile platforms by optimising reflection and transmission.

abstract: Disclosed are agglomerating and/or reactive particles for use with solvent-based inks and, more specifically, solvent-based inks relied on for 3D printing and/or extrusion techniques. One example includes hydrophilic particles that are polymer coated agglomerating particles. The polymer coating prevents the agglomerating particles from agglomerating when exposed to moisture. The coated agglomerating particles may be milled. The milled particles may be individually sieved. Further, the polymer coating may be removed from the milled particles upon dissolution in a solution. Another example includes coating particles that are reactive in a solvent-based ink wherein the coating provides a barrier preventing reaction in the solvent-based ink.

Another purpose is to provide a semi-aromatic polyamide film obtained from the semi-aromatic polyamide composition, the semi-aromatic polyamide film having a low yellowness and high breaking resistance, being less apt to thermally shrink in high-temperature atmospheres, and having high moist-heat resistance in high-temperature high-humidity atmospheres. This semi-aromatic polyamide composition comprises a semi-aromatic polyamide, a heat stabilizer based on a hindered phenol, and a heat stabilizer based on a hindered amine.

abstract: A plurality of magnetic nanoparticles (30) are mixed with a solvent (111). An external magnetic field is applied to the solvent in which the plurality of magnetic nanoparticles are mixed. By doing so, the plurality of magnetic nanopowders are linearly connected, and a plurality of thread-like magnetic powders (100), in which a plurality of magnetic nanopowders are magnetically oriented along an extension thereof, are generated. The solvent is vaporized to take out the plurality of thread-like magnetic powders. Extrusion molding is performed in a state in which the plurality of thread-like magnetic powders and a liquid molding resin are mixed. By doing so, the plurality of thread-like magnetic powders are extended in the pressing direction, and a magnetic body in which the plurality of thread-like magnetic powders are arranged in a direction orthogonal to the pressing direction is produced.

title: FLAT CONDUCTOR
assignee: KYUNGSHIN CABLE [KR]; 주식회사 경신전선
inventors: KIM HAK JUN [KR]; CHOI BYEONG HO [KR]; OH KYUN [KR] et al.

abstract: The present invention proposes a structural design for a flat conductor that enhances electrical stability, thereby reducing the risk of fire, and that is applicable to battery packs of electric vehicles (EVs) and energy storage systems (ESSs). The flat conductor design according to the present invention enables efficient arrangement of components even in confined spaces, and improves current efficiency when used in motor windings. In this case, in order to improve electrical characteristics, the flat conductor is designed to minimize voids within a cross section for a given width and thickness, thereby maximizing a space factor, which is defined as a ratio of the net cross-sectional area of the conductor to the gross cross-section area. Additionally, the radius of curvature of corners of the flat conductor is optimized to prevent damage to mica tape during an insulation process and to maintain a uniform insulation thickness during extrusion of an insulating coating.

inventors: TORGERSON NICHOLAS [US]; HERR RYAN [US]; MCCLAIN MONIQUE SUZANNE [US] et al.
matched_tags: Oxygen barrier biodegradable coating film
abstract: [0000]    An extrusion device for fiber reinforced polymer filament may include an extruder which outputs a thermoplastic melt into a flow path. An incorporation chamber may be disposed along the flow path downstream of the extruder. The incorporation chamber may include a channel that partially defines the flow path. The incorporation chamber may supply the fibers to the channel. A rotatable nozzle may partially define the flow path downstream of the incorporation chamber. A motor operatively connected to the rotatable nozzle may rotate the rotatable nozzle about a longitudinal axis of the flow path. During operation, the thermoplastic melt receives the fibers within the incorporation chamber and the rotating nozzle imparts a torsional shear to the thermoplastic melt such that the fibers become entangled and helically oriented within the thermoplastic as filament is extruded from the rotatable nozzle.

abstract: [0000]    A method and system for perforating stretch film. The stretch film may be extruded using a cast film or blown film extrusion process. The stretch film may be passed over a first idler roller and moved in a first direction toward a perforation roller. The perforation roller may have a center axle and a plurality of perforation rings, each of which has an outer ring, a plurality of pins extending through the outer ring, and an inner ring configured to hold the plurality of pins in an extended position through the outer ring. The stretch film may be perforated with the perforation roller as the stretch film passes over the perforation roller. The perforated stretch film may be moved in a second direction away from the perforation roller, passed over a second idler roller, and wrapped about a core to form a roll of perforated stretch film.

title: PASTA MACHINE WITH HEATED DIE
assignee: DEFRANCISCI MACHINE COMPANY LLC [US]; DEFRANCISCI MACHINE COMPANY LLC
inventors: DEFRANCISCI LEONARD JOSEPH [US]; DEFRANCISCI JOSEPH LAWRENCE [US]; DeFrancisci, Leonard Joseph et al.
matched_tags: Oxygen barrier biodegradable coating film
abstract: [0000]    A pasta machine includes an adaptive die-heating system configured to preheat a pasta forming die prior to extrusion. The system comprises a heater, a blower, temperature sensors, and a programmable logic controller (PLC) operatively coupled to an artificial-intelligence (AI) module. The PLC controls heater power and airflow while the AI monitors temperature feedback to predict, correct, and refine the heating process. Each die is identified by serial number or recipe data, and the AI retrieves and updates a die-specific heating profile based on historical performance. The system automatically adjusts energy distribution between radiant and convective sources to achieve uniform temperature equilibrium. Over successive runs, the AI learns optimal heating parameters to reduce energy usage, minimize startup waste, and ensure consistent pasta quality from the first extrusion cycle. The invention provides a self-optimizing, data-driven improvement over fixed-parameter preheating systems.

The first major surface of the first cellulosic layer is configured to face away from a product to be packaged and the second major surface of the first cellulosic layer has undergone surface treatment. A second cellulosic layer has a first major surface and a second major surface opposite the first major surface. The first major surface of the second cellulosic layer is configured to face toward a product to be packaged and the second major surface of the second cellulosic layer has undergone surface treatment. A pattern bonded extrusion interlayer comprises a compostable polymer disposed between the first and second cellulosic layers and defines bonded and unbonded regions arranged in a patterned configuration.

title: Method of manufacturing a brick slip
assignee: KEYFIX LTD [GB]; Keyfix Limited
inventors: JOHN DUFFIN [GB]; SEAN COYLE [GB]; John Duffin et al.
matched_tags: Oxygen barrier biodegradable coating film
abstract: A method of manufacturing a brick slip is disclosed comprising extruding a raw material into a shape having front 102 and rear 104 faces, and first 106 and second 108 longitudinal edges. The brick slip is then formed having first 116 and second 118 transverse edges extending between first and second longitudinal edges and it is then fired. Material 120a,b is then processed or removed from the front face to form a tongue running along the first transverse edge 116a, and material is also removed from the rear face 118a,b to form a groove running along the second transverse edge. During the extrusion process two bricks back to back are formed with front faces 102 facing outward and back faces 104 touching. A brick slip itself and a panel comprising a number of brick slips which is then used as cladding are also claimed. [Figure 7]

title: Cat Counter Barrier Device
assignee: BEAR JANUARY [US]; Bear January
inventors: BEAR JANUARY [US]; Bear, January
matched_tags: Oxygen barrier biodegradable coating film
abstract: A cat counter barrier device is provided. The device is designed to prevent cats from accessing counters and other flat surfaces by providing a customizable and repositionable barrier. The device comprises at least one base with a flat bottom surface that may incorporate a textured, non-slip material or various fastening mechanisms such as adhesives, suction cups, or magnetic strips for stability. The base includes attachment points that secure removable panels using slots, clips, magnets, or interlocking tabs. The panels are constructed from scratch-resistant materials like polycarbonate or tempered glass and may feature odor-neutralizing coatings or phosphorescent elements for visibility. Additionally, decorative textures can be applied to enhance aesthetics. The system allows for modular configurations, where multiple panels connect to form a continuous barrier, ensuring adaptability to various counter layouts.

title: AlN SCHOTTKY BARRIER DIODES ON BULK AlN SUBSTRATES
assignee: FU HOUQIANG [US]; HERATH MUDIYANSELAGE DINUSHA [US]; WANG DAWEI [US] et al.
inventors: FU HOUQIANG [US]; HERATH MUDIYANSELAGE DINUSHA [US]; WANG DAWEI [US] et al.
matched_tags: Oxygen barrier biodegradable coating film
abstract: A Schottky barrier diode includes an AlN substrate, an AlN layer formed by metalorganic chemical vapor deposition on the AlN substrate, a Si-doped n-AlN layer formed by metalorganic chemical vapor deposition on the AlN layer, a GaN capping layer, an Ohmic contact on the GaN capping layer, and a Schottky contact on the GaN capping layer, wherein a breakdown voltage of the Schottky barrier diode exceeds 3 kV. Fabricating a Schottky barrier diode includes depositing a first AlN layer on an AlN substrate, depositing a second AlN layer on the first AlN layer, depositing a capping layer on the second AlN layer, forming an Ohmic contact on the capping layer via electron beam deposition followed by rapid thermal annealing, and forming a Schottky contact on the capping layer by electron beam evaporation. The second AlN layer includes silicon-doped AlN, and the capping layer includes GaN.

The first and second barriers are movably arranged in the flow path, and the first barrier is bidirectionally movable between the inlet port and the outlet port and further includes a biasing force acting on the first barrier directed towards the inlet port.

title: ANTI-BALLISTIC BARRIER SYSTEM

The plurality of second anti-ballistic shields are configured to overlap in front of and be in contact with the plurality of first anti-ballistic shields. Each side of the frame is further comprised of a plurality of vertical and horizontal supports and a panel coupled to the side is coupled to a rod positioned on one side of at least one of the horizontal supports.

title: APPARATUS WITH INTEGRATED PLANAR MOSFET AND INTEGRATED PLANAR SCHOTTKY BARRIER DIODE

abstract: [0000]    An apparatus including a planar metal oxide semiconductor field-effect transistor and a planar Schottky barrier diode that are physically and functionally integrated into a single, continuous structure, and a method of making such an apparatus. The planar Schottky barrier diode is located over a junction field-effect transistor neck region which is adjacent to the planar metal oxide semiconductor field-effect transistor in a single, continuous volume of semiconductor material. The planar metal oxide semiconductor field-effect transistor may include first and second transistor sides spaced apart at respective first and second sides of the volume of semiconductor material, in which case the junction field-effect transistor neck region and the planar Schottky barrier diode are located between the first and second transistor sides.

title: METHOD FOR CONTROLLING A ROAD VEHICLE WITH A STEER-BY-WIRE STEERING SYSTEM IN CASE OF ROAD WHEEL ACTUATOR FAILURE
assignee: THYSSENKRUPP PRESTA AG [LI]; HONDA MOTOR CO LTD [JP]; THYSSENKRUPP PRESTA AG et al.

abstract: The invention relates to a method for controlling a road vehicle (1) with a steer-by-wire steering system (2) in an alternative steering functionality mode (12) after total failure of a road wheel actuator (3), wherein the road vehicle (1) comprises two axles each with two wheels (RL, RR, FL, FR), wherein the front two wheels (FL, FR) can be steered by means of a front axle steering system and are connected to one another via a rack (10) of the steering system (2) of the front axle steering system, and wherein the road vehicle (1) has a brake system which acts on the four wheels (RL, RR, FL, FR), wherein the method includes the following steps: a) Checking the steer-by-wire steering system (2) for the presence of a road wheel actuator (3) failure and for the state of performance availability, b) Carrying out the alternative steering functionality mode (12) in the event that a failure of the road wheel actuator (3) has been detected, wherein the alternative steering functionality mode (12) includes longitudinal control (13), lateral control (14), and road wheel actuator control (15), wherein the road wheel actuator control (15) includes an on and off turning of a phase-short damping of the road wheel actuator (3).

abstract: The present invention relates to the field of biomedicine, and in particular to a Nectin-4-targeting single-domain antibody, a chimeric antigen receptor, and a use thereof. The provided anti-Nectin-4 single-domain antibody has the advantages of low molecular weight, high solubility, high stability, low immunogenicity, and high tissue permeability, and requires no additional folding and assembly steps or linker optimization and modification, so that said antibody becomes a promising alternative to antibodies having a large molecular weight, such as monoclonal antibodies and scFv single-chain antibodies.

title: CART WITH PHYSICAL SENSOR TO DETECT ITEM REMOVAL AND GENERATE USER INTERFACE WITH ALTERNATIVE OPTION
assignee: MAPLEBEAR INC [US]; Maplebear Inc.
inventors: SHAH NAVAL [CA]; WESLEY CHARLES [US]; SCHEIBELHUT BRENT [CA] et al.
matched_tags: Oxygen barrier biodegradable coating film
abstract: [0000]    A device interfaced with an online system detects, via a physical sensor, item removal and generates a user interface with an alternative option for conversion. Upon receiving a signal from the device indicating the item removal, the online system selects a set of candidate items for replacement of the removed item, wherein each candidate item has a conversion value that is less than a conversion value of the removed item. The online system applies a trained machine-learning model to generate a conversion score for each candidate item that indicates a likelihood of conversion by the user of each candidate item. The online system selects, based on the conversion score for each candidate item, a replacement item from the set of candidate items, and generates a user interface signal that causes a user interface of the device to prompt the user to convert the replacement item.

title: PASSWORD HINT MANAGEMENT SYSTEM WITH USER-GENERATED AND AUTO GENERATED PASSWORD HINTS

inventors: LESCHENSKY RYAN CHARLES [US]; Leschensky, Ryan Charles
matched_tags: Oxygen barrier biodegradable coating film
abstract: A password management system is disclosed that helps users recall passwords by providing both user-generated and automatically generated hints. Users can record voice or written hints that do not store the password but offer clues to help recall it. In an alternative embodiment, the system automatically analyzes the password or the password requirements of the website and generates a hint that describes the password's parameters (e.g., number of characters, capitalization, use of special symbols). These hints are stored securely and can be retrieved when the user needs to enter the password.

title: Positional Support Pillow for Preventing Supine Sleeping
assignee: LEWIS HIOLIN M [US]; Lewis Hiolin M
inventors: LEWIS HIOLIN M [US]; Lewis, Hiolin M
matched_tags: Oxygen barrier biodegradable coating film
abstract: A positional support pillow is provided for encouraging side-sleeping and preventing a user from rolling onto their back during sleep. The pillow includes a body shaped as a triangular prism with adjustable straps that secure the pillow to the user's back. The sloped prism geometry distributes pressure evenly across broad surfaces, reducing localized discomfort while increasing the force required to roll into a supine position. The straps may include hook-and-loop fasteners or elastic sections for comfort and adjustability. Optional features include cooling gel fabric for temperature regulation and alternative geometric shapes. The device promotes comfort, stability, and improved breathing by maintaining a lateral sleeping posture.

title: METHOD AND DEVICE FOR ADAPTIVE REINFORCEMENT LEARNING CONTROL OF A TECHNICAL SYSTEM
assignee: ABB SCHWEIZ AG [CH]; ABB SCHWEIZ AG
inventors: RASTEGARPOUR SOROUSH [SE]; FEYZMAHDAVIAN HAMID [SE]; ISAKSSON ALF [SE] et al.
matched_tags: Oxygen barrier biodegradable coating film
abstract: A method (200) of controlling a technical system comprises: providing (211) a reinforcement learning (RL) agent, which has been trained to control the technical system in a nominal operating condition; using the RL agent, generating (212) a tentative control action to be applied to the technical system in its current state; and assessing (213) whether a current operating condition of the technical system is nominal. If the current operating condition of the technical system is nominal, the tentative control action is applied (214). If instead the current operating condition of the technical system is non-nominal, an alternative control action, which approximates the tentative control action and is consistent with the non-nominal current operating condition, is applied (216).

title: CLOUD-BASED TOKENIZATION FOR VALUE TRANSFER
assignee: NCR VOYIX CORP [US]; NCR Voyix Corporation
inventors: BENNETT GINA TORCIVIA [US]; JONG WUCHIEH JAMES [US]; MORGAN KIP OLIVER [US] et al.
matched_tags: Oxygen barrier biodegradable coating film
abstract: A cloud-based system manages tokens for tipping and small payments in service industries. Customers purchase tokens at point-of-sale (POS) terminals and/or Self-Service Terminals (SSTs), which are registered with unique identifiers in an enterprise or cloud-based database. These tokens can be physical objects with stamped or printed denominations. Customers distribute tokens to service workers, who redeem them for cash or goods. The system includes features like expiration dates, loyalty account linking, and token recycling. The system addresses the decline of cash tipping by providing a secure, flexible alternative that maintains the practice of rewarding good service. The system aims to solve problems such as unfair tip distribution, safety concerns with carrying cash, and the inconvenience of cashless transactions in tipping scenarios.

title: OMNICHANNEL SELLING ENGINE AND ORDERING ARCHITECTURE
assignee: NCR VOYIX CORP [US]; NCR Voyix Corporation
inventors: TRENCSENYI ZSOLT [CZ]; KLOZ VLADIMIR [CZ]; BRABEC JAN [CZ] et al.
matched_tags: Oxygen barrier biodegradable coating film
abstract: [0000]    An omnichannel ordering architecture is disclosed that enables seamless integration of multiple ordering channels and platforms. The system comprises a cloud-based platform with a central open check object that maintains real-time order state and manages concurrent modifications from various personas. The architecture includes an application programming interface (API) for creating, modifying, and manipulating checks, as well as integrating with existing point-of-sale (POS) systems. The platform supports flexible ownership transfer between cloud and store systems, allowing for efficient order management across different channels. The system can operate during network connectivity loss through alternative communication methods. This architecture improves order accuracy, enhances customer experience, and streamlines operations for food service businesses by providing a unified, real-time order management solution across diverse ordering channels and platforms.

title: BACKPROPAGATION AND MONTE CARLO TREES FOR SOFTWARE VULNERABILITY ANALYSIS
assignee: IBM [US]; International Business Machines Corporation
inventors: YOU YU ZUI [CN]; LUO DENG XIN [CN]; HAN RUI [CN] et al.
matched_tags: Oxygen barrier biodegradable coating film
abstract: A Monte Carlo tree structure of related software packages for a software project is constructed, wherein one or more vulnerable nodes of the Monte Carlo tree structure indicate a software vulnerability. A Monte Carlo tree search algorithm is applied on the Monte Carlo tree structure, the applying comprising expanding the Monte Carlo tree structure with multiple respective candidate nodes corresponding to alternative software packages for replacement of the one or more vulnerable nodes and performing iterative simulation and backpropagation through different tree updates using the multiple respective candidate nodes to identify at least one best replacement node from the multiple candidate nodes. A repaired software set for the software project is exported, the repaired software set including additional software corresponding to the at least one identified best replacement node, the additional software replacing one or more software packages that are related to the one or more vulnerable nodes.

title: MODULATED LASER BIAS AND DRIVER CIRCUITS
assignee: MACOM TECH SOLUTIONS HOLDINGS INC [US]; MACOM Technology Solutions Holdings, Inc.
inventors: GUPTA ATUL KRISHNA [US]; LATCHMAN RYAN SURESH [US]; Gupta, Atul Krishna et al.
matched_tags: Oxygen barrier biodegradable coating film
abstract: Bias and driver circuits for modulated lasers are described. An example bias and driver circuit includes a laser, an electro-absorption optical modulator configured to modulate light output from the laser, a driver, and a power converter. The electro-absorption optical modulator is coupled between a float node and a ground node in the bias and driver circuit. The driver has an output coupled to the electro-absorption optical modulator, and the driver is configured to control the electro-absorption optical modulator to modulate the light output from the laser. The power converter is configured to maintain the float node at a potential greater than the ground node. The bias and driver circuits provide an alternative circuit arrangement for modulated lasers, including electro-absorption modulated lasers (EMLs), and are designed to operate without the use of ferrite beads or inductors in filter networks that would otherwise be coupled between the drivers and the modulators.

title: TWO-STROKE RECIPROCATING INTERNAL COMBUSTION ENGINE AND POWER SYSTEM THEREOF
assignee: MUNOZ SAIZ MANUEL [ES]; MUÑOZ SAIZ, Manuel
inventors: MUÑOZ SAIZ MANUEL [ES]; MUÑOZ SAIZ, Manuel
matched_tags: Oxygen barrier biodegradable coating film
abstract: The present invention relates to an alternative two-stroke reciprocating internal combustion engine and power system thereof which eliminates the intake and compression phases of four-stroke Otto engines, and injects the fuel and the oxidising agent at high pressure directly into the combustion chamber or a prechamber at approximately the moment when the piston is at the top dead centre (TDC), using oxygen and/or air as the oxidising agent and hydrogen-based fuels, synthetic fuels, biofuels, alcohols, natural gas and mixtures thereof. At the same time, a spark is applied or combustion is produced by self-ignition, and expansion occurs until the piston reaches the bottom dead centre (BDC). The piston then starts to rise, the mechanically or electrically actuated exhaust valve opens and exhaust is discharged until the TDC is reached again, thereby repeating the cycle.

title: BIT DAMAGE INDICATOR

inventors: SPENCER REED W [US]; Spencer, Reed W.

abstract: A method of monitoring the wear of a drill bit of a drilling system is provided. The method includes drilling into a formation using the drill bit of the drilling system, obtaining a weight-on-bit (“WOB”) from sensors of the drilling system, and obtaining a torque-on-bit (“TOB”) from the sensors of the drilling system. A bit damage indicator (“BDI”) is determined that is correlated with the wear of the drill bit based on a relationship between the WOB and the TOB.

Encoder for encoding a digital wave form signal, DWS, into a data stream, the DWS having a plurality of channels, wherein the encoder is configured to encode a channel dependency indicator, indicating a partitioning of the channels of the plurality of channels in subsets of channels; and wherein the encoder is configured to perform an encoding of a channel signal of a channel of a subset of channels by exploiting inter-channel dependencies between channels of the same subset of channels and without exploiting inter-channel dependencies between channels of different subsets of channels. abstract: [0000]    Application servers may provide computing services to entities. A data aggregator may determine data buckets based on the application-level request messages. A data bucket may include information characterizing one or more features. The information may be determined based on a subset of the application-level request messages received during a respective period of time. A request analyzer may determine one or more of the data buckets and one or more of the features for analyzing an application-level request message and may determine a synthetic indicator for the request based on the one or more data buckets and the one or more features. title: TECHNIQUES FOR CONSTRAINT-DRIVEN QUERY ROUTING OVER DISPARATE DATA STORES
assignee: ORACLE INT CORP [US]; Oracle International Corporation
inventors: GROVER RAMAN [US]; Grover, Raman
matched_tags: Smart packaging freshness biosensor
abstract: [0000]    Techniques are disclosed for constraint-driven query routing in heterogeneous data environments with disparate data stores. In one aspect, a method includes receiving a query in a first programming language and associated with one or more constraints. The constraints can include freshness, feasibility, divergence, and/or execution time. An intent of the query is identified, and a dry run of the query is performed to evaluate whether a data store satisfies the constraints. An optimal data store is selected based on the dry run. A query result is generated by determining whether the query in the first programming language can be executed on the optimal data store. The query is executed on the optimal data store if the first programming language is executable on the optimal data store. Otherwise, the query is converted to a second query in a second programming that can be executed on the optimal data store.

abstract: An apparatus has history storage for maintaining history information comprising a sequence of history indicators generated during execution of a program by processing circuitry, and update circuitry, responsive to a given update event detected during execution of the program, to generate a history indicator associated with the given update event, and to update the history information using the generated history indicator. Prediction circuitry, responsive to a given prediction event detected during execution of the program, uses at least a portion of the history information to identify prediction information and generates a prediction associated with the given prediction event in dependence on the identified prediction information. The update circuitry is configured to detect whether an aliasing concern condition is present indicating that the history information may be insufficient, for at least one prediction event, to enable the prediction circuitry to discriminate between different contexts of that at least one prediction event that are dependent on execution history of the program. Absent detection of the aliasing concern condition, the update circuitry performs a default indicator generation operation to generate the history indicator associated with the given update event, but when the aliasing concern condition is detected, it instead performs a modified indicator generation operation to generate the history indicator associated with the given update event.

title: INTELLIGENT AUDIOVISUAL CONTROL SYSTEMS AND METHODS WITH LLM-BASED ROOM AGENT AND SPECIALIZED SUB-AGENT COORDINATION

matched_tags: Smart packaging freshness biosensor
abstract: [0000]    An intelligent audiovisual control system is provided that utilizes a hierarchical, agentic artificial-intelligence framework. A large language model (LLM) operating as a room agent interprets input data and delegates execution to one or more task-specific LLMs that perform specialized functions. The system establishes communication among agents and includes an environment-assignment module for binding agents to physical environments or functional domains, and defines supervisory and subordinate relationships across physical environments. Each agent monitors sensor data and actuates connected control systems such as lighting, HVAC, and audiovisual equipment. The architecture enables scalable, context-aware, and privacy-preserving coordination of intelligent environments through distributed reasoning and autonomous task delegation.

abstract: The invention relates to road safety, specifically to an intelligent optical signaling and warning system for pedestrian crossings, and can be used to increase the visibility of pedestrians and pedestrian markings, particularly in conditions of limited visibility.The intelligent system, according to the invention, comprises at least one road sign (3) for pedestrian crossings, mounted on a support (1), on which are also mounted in the upper part a lamp (2) for illuminating pedestrian markings and a monitoring and control module (7) in the lower part. The road sign (3) is equipped with passive (5) and active (6) warning LEDs and at least one brightness sensor (4). The module (7) includes a laser projector (8) for projecting visual information messages for pedestrians onto the sidewalk and a microcontroller, to which are functionally connected a macroblock for activating the road sign (3) and the projector (8), a GPS module for synchronizing road signs (3) of the intelligent system, a macroblock for controlling LEDs (5) and (6), a macroblock for configuring the parameters of the intelligent system, a macroblock for recording statistical and operational data, a macroblock for synchronizing the activation of road signs (3), a local communication macroblock connected to a device for local adjustment of the road sign (3), a remote communication macroblock connected via a radio concentrator to a server, a proximity sensor and a display.

abstract: The present invention relates to an active dehumidification container having a breathing function, the container maintaining relative humidity inside a container at or below a predetermined level to prevent condensation from forming on cargo loaded inside the container. The container is provided with a ventilation module which allows air to flow in and out of the container and has a function of controlling humidity inside the container, the ventilation module comprising: a sensing unit for sensing a specific physical quantity inside the container; a valve unit for allowing air to flow in and out of the container or blocking the airflow on the basis of the physical quantity sensed by the sensing unit; a dehumidifying agent holder connected to the valve unit; and a dehumidifying member connected to the dehumidifying agent holder and having a dehumidifying agent inside such that the air outside the container, which has passed through the valve unit, undergoes a dehumidifying process before being introduced into the container.

title: APPARATUS, SYSTEM, AND METHOD FOR ACTIVE AND ADAPTIVE MULTISENSORY STIMULATION TO ENHANCE COGNITIVE FUNCTION
assignee: RODRIGUEZ BACH IGNACIO [MX]; RODRÍGUEZ-BACH, Ignacio
inventors: RODRÍGUEZ-BACH IGNACIO [MX]; RODRÍGUEZ-BACH, Ignacio
matched_tags: Smart packaging freshness biosensor
abstract: An apparatus, system, and method for active and adaptive multisensory stimulation are disclosed. The apparatus comprises a handheld housing with integrated light, sound, and tactile vibration elements to promote active user engagement. A processing means within the apparatus is operatively coupled to the stimulation elements and to an input configured to receive physiological data from a user, such as from an electroencephalogram (EEG) sensor. The processing means autonomously and dynamically adjusts parameters of the synchronized stimuli in real-time based on the received physiological data, creating a closed-loop biofeedback system for personalized stimulation. The apparatus can also function as a central hub, transmitting synchronization signals to one or more peripheral stimulation elements to create an immersive, synchronized environment. The stimulation, often centered around a base frequency of approximately 40 Hz, is intended to enhance cognitive function and mitigate cognitive decline.

abstract: The present disclosure relates to an active-feedback, speed-adjustable, low-power voltage regulator for a high-voltage energy harvester. According to one aspect of the present invention, the voltage regulator comprises: a comparator for comparing, to the reference voltage, a feedback voltage generated by stepping down the output voltage of the voltage regulator by a predetermined ratio; and a feedback circuit that outputs, according to the comparison result of the comparator, a feedback signal for adjusting the output voltage to a target voltage, wherein the comparator dynamically adjusts the comparison speed according to a voltage difference between the feedback voltage and the reference voltage and the feedback circuit adjusts the reference voltage according to the voltage difference.

Le système comprend une seconde source (203) du fluide caloporteur, le fluide de la seconde source (203) étant chauffé par un des deux dispositifs (100a-100c) jusqu’à une température haute, et un des dispositifs (100a-100c) est chauffé par le fluide de la seconde source (203). title: LOW-TEMPERATURE PRESERVATION STABILIZER, LOW-TEMPERATURE STABILIZED HYDROGEL, BIOMOLECULE LOW-TEMPERATURE PRESERVATION COMPOSITION, AND CELL LOW-TEMPERATURE PRESERVATION COMPOSITION
assignee: GEL COAT BIOMATERIALS INC [JP]; UNIV TOKYO [JP]; 株式会社Ｇｅｌ　Ｃｏａｔ　Ｂｉｏｍａｔｅｒｉａｌｓ et al.

matched_tags: Smart packaging freshness biosensor
abstract: Provided are a low-temperature preservation stabilizer and a low-temperature stabilized hydrogel that, even when biomolecules and cells are preserved at a low temperature, can suppress cell death and inactivation of the biomolecules after being thawed. Also provided is a biomolecule low-temperature preservation composition that, even when biomolecules are preserved at a low temperature, can suppress inactivation of the biomolecules after being thawed. Further provided is a cell low-temperature preservation composition that, even when cells are preserved at a low temperature, can suppress cell death after being thawed.　The low-temperature preservation stabilizer comprises a polymer including, as a repeating unit, a monomer unit i) having a zwitterionic group in a side chain. The polymer is preferably a copolymer including, as a repeating unit, a monomer unit ii) having a hydrophobic group in a side chain. This low-temperature stabilized hydrogel contains a low-temperature preservation stabilizer and water. This biomolecule low-temperature preservation composition contains a low-temperature preservation stable hydrogel, water, and biomolecules. This cell low-temperature preservation composition contains a low-temperature stabilized hydrogel, water, a medium, and cells.

In some embodiments, the system may include at least one sensor configured to measure a plurality of heat flux measurements of a subject over time; a processor configured to receive the plurality of heat flux measurements over time, characterize the relationship between heat flux and temperature over time, and detect a transition from a first thermoregulatory control state to a second thermoregulatory control state prior to an onset of fever or infection; and an indicator prompting proposed intervention prior to the onset of fever or infection. The disclosed technology also generally relates, in certain embodiments, to systems for the early detection of fever, particular in sepsis patients, and methods of detecting health anomalies in sepsis patients.

abstract: A tag can be configured with an anonymous mode of operation in which identifiers are obfuscated into anonymized identifier codes. An anonymized identifier code may be deanonymized if a hint and a code used to generate the hint are known. An RFID reader may inventory the tag while it is operating in the anonymous mode and obtain the anonymized identifier code, optionally receive a collision-resolution code, and a hint based on one of the received codes. The RFID reader may provide the anonymized identifier code, the hint, and the code used to generate the hint to a service. The service may use the hint and the code to identify a tag key associated with the radio tag IC. The tag key may then be used to recover an identifier from the anonymized identifier code.

abstract: A diffusion model-based high resolution virtual staining method is disclosed that uses a Brownian bridge process to enhance both the spatial resolution and fidelity of label-free virtual tissue staining. The method integrates novel sampling techniques into a diffusion model-based image inference process to significantly reduce the variance in the generated virtually stained images, resulting in more stable and accurate outputs. Blindly applied to lower-resolution auto-fluorescence images of label-free human lung tissue samples, the diffusion-based super-resolution virtual staining model consistently outperformed conventional approaches in resolution, structural similarity and perceptual accuracy. Diffusion-based super-resolved virtual tissue staining improves resolution and image quality as well as enhances the reliability of virtual staining without traditional chemical staining.

abstract: A quantum-authenticated digital token generation system comprises a classical computing device with parameter calculation and verification modules, and a quantum computing device with control devices, connected via an exchange interface. The system enforces quantum mechanical speed limits by calculating minimum evolution times based on energy uncertainty from quantum hardware characteristics. Quantum hardware execution is verified through quantum state overlap analysis, entropy measurements, and noise signature verification. The system implements quantum hardware fingerprinting using device-specific calibration data including qubit frequencies and decoherence times. Echo revival protocols employ time-reversed quantum circuits to verify quantum coherence maintenance, distinguishing genuine quantum operations from classical simulation. Multi-modal verification combines quantum mechanical constraints, hardware attestation, and cryptographic commitments with temporal anti-precomputation mechanisms. The system integrates with blockchain networks through transaction assembly modules, providing quantum-enhanced security for digital tokens.

abstract: A method of providing a quantity of hot water suitable for domestic washing or bathing utilising a heating appliance (1) having a housing containing a thermal energy store (2), a first heat exchanger (3) and a second heat exchanger (4). The thermal store (2) stores unpressurised energy storage fluid. The first heat exchanger (3) is coupled between the thermal energy store (2) and a heat source, and a first pump circulates the energy storage fluid through the first heat exchanger. The second heat exchanger (4) is coupled between the thermal energy store (2) and an incoming cold water pipe providing incoming cold water to be heated, and a second pump circulates the energy storage fluid through the second heat exchanger. A flow rate sensor (43) detect the flow rate of the hot water to one or more hot water outlets when a hot water outlet is opened. A processor (36) receives information from the flow rate sensor and one or more other sensors and compares the received information with information pre-stored in a memory. The method includes detecting the opening of a hot water outlet, activating the second pump, and using the received information to decide whether the heat source should be activated.

abstract: [0000]    This invention provides new ways of distributing dilute and concentrate waters to the spaces between cation and anion ion exchange membranes in an electrodialysis system. An external attached manifold is used to distribute-and-retrieve concentrate water to-and-from each concentrate water space, which by the design of components can mitigate the power lost in the concentrate water distribution system. Furthermore, the dilute water is externally and simultaneously distributed to the dilute water spaces, that are between the adjacent anion and cation ion exchange membranes in the electrodialysis stack of components, and the thickness of the dilute water spaces can be kept to be as low as on-the-order-of one-tenth-inch while maintaining good dilute water flow rates. Finally, this invention provides a means of obtaining Zero Liquid Discharge ZLD desalination operation.

A plurality of electrode plates are arranged in the upper space of a flared pipe to form an upward-flow electrocoagulation chamber; a cover body surrounds the flared pipe; the top end of the cover body is sealingly connected to the top of a tank body, the bottom end of the cover body is an open end, and a downward-flow flocculation chamber is formed between the cover body and the flared pipe; a membrane filtration chamber, an assembly cleaning device, a turbidity protection layer, a biofilm honeycomb chamber and a sludge concentration chamber are sequentially arranged from top to bottom in the inner space of the tank body outside the cover body; and a sludge discharge assembly is connected to the outer side of the upper part of the sludge concentration chamber. For water from different sources, hollow fiber ultrafiltration membrane assemblies or hollow fiber nanofiltration membrane assemblies can be used in combination with flocculation and precipitation, biofilms, and the turbidity protection layer, and operating modes are diversified, enabling the water purification device to serve multiple purposes.

abstract: [0000]    A water management technology is disclosed, including devices, systems, and methods for monitoring, managing, and reducing water usage alone or in combination with carbon footprint. In one embodiment, the device comprises a real-time water metering system, leak detection sensors, integration means for various water recycling and purification technologies, a processor for analyzing water usage data, and a communication interface. The system involves a comprehensive approach that combines monitoring and reducing both water and carbon footprints, including footprint monitoring services, reduction processes, and an integrated dashboard. The method encapsulates measuring consumption, detecting leaks, integrating data points, and analyzing water and energy consumption through the use of IoT devices, advanced algorithms, and collaboration with energy providers. The invention can leverage a range of existing technologies and provides actionable insights for conservation, efficiency, and sustainability, facilitating water stewardship, and compliance with environmental regulations.

assignee: SHANGHAI INST MATERIA MEDICA CAS [CN]; 中国科学院上海药物研究所
inventors: LIAO CANGSONG [CN]; ZHANG JINGXUAN [CN]; 廖苍松 et al.
matched_tags: Probiotic beverage fermented kombucha kefir
abstract: Provided in the present invention are a biosynthesis method for efficiently producing aromatic unnatural amino acids and site-specifically modified recombinant proteins, an engineered strain, and use thereof. Specifically, the present invention provides an engineered bacterium. Genes of exogenous enzymes, threonine aldolase and threonine deaminase, are introduced into the engineered bacterium, and the engineered bacterium expresses both the threonine aldolase and the threonine deaminase. The engineered bacterium of the present invention enables efficient synthesis of aromatic unnatural amino acids by means of whole-cell catalysis or fermentation transformation. The synthetic route of the present invention can be synergistically coupled with gene codon extension technology in the same engineered bacterium for efficient expression of recombinant target proteins site-specifically modified with aromatic unnatural amino acids.

inventors: PATEL HARESHKUMAR J [IN]; PATEL, Hareshkumar J
matched_tags: Gut health microbiome probiotic formulation
abstract: The present invention relates to a synergistic composition for the improvement of compromised muscle health and management of sarcopenia. In particular, the invention provides a composition comprising ecdysterone, calcium hydroxy methylbutyrate, and selenium, wherein the constituents act synergistically to promote enhancement of skeletal muscle mass, muscular strength, and functional physical performance. Sarcopenia is a progressive and degenerative condition characterized by the loss of skeletal muscle mass and strength, commonly associated with aging or chronic disease and is recognized as a major contributor to increased risk of falls, mobility limitations, physical disability and elevated healthcare burden. The composition disclosed herein offers a comprehensive therapeutic approach for the prevention, delay or treatment of sarcopenia and related muscle-wasting disorders. The composition is formulated for oral administration and may be presented in various dosage forms including but not limited to powder, tablet, capsule, and syrup. The oral formulation facilitates user compliance and effective systemic delivery, thereby providing a practical and efficacious intervention for mitigating skeletal muscle deterioration and its associated physiological and functional impairments.

title: KIT FOR TREATING OR ALLEVIATING TRAUMATIC BRAIN INJURY COMPRISING ANTIBIOTICS USED FOR NORMALIZATION OF PULMONARY MICROBIOME
assignee: UNIV HALLYM IACF [KR]; 한림대학교 산학협력단
inventors: HONG JI YOUNG [KR]; JEON JIN PYEONG [KR]; LEE JAE JUN [KR] et al.
matched_tags: Gut health microbiome probiotic formulation
abstract: Herein, an exploration was made of the potential therapeutic effect of injecting neomycin into the lung immediately after traumatic brain injury (TBI). It was hypothesized that modulation of the pulmonary microbiome may help alleviate neuroinflammation and cognitive impairment following TBI. Traumatic brain injury induced neutrophil infiltration into the alveoli along with interstitial pulmonary edema, and reduced levels of caspase-1, IL-1β, and RAGE. TBI rats treated with neomycin exhibited a significant decrease in Acinetobacter levels in BAL and a decrease in α-diversity Shannon index compared to rats without neomycin. The neomycin-administered TBI rats exhibited a higher discrimination index in a novel object recognition test, indicating that cognitive impairment was alleviated. While serum inflammatory cytokines in injured mice tended to increase for up to 7 days, such increases were not observed from day 3 in neomycin-administered TBI rats. Injection of neomycin into the lung immediately after TBI effectively alleviated neuroinflammation and cognitive impairment through modulation of the pulmonary microbiome.

Also disclosed herein are methods of determining whether a pet food composition improves the oral health of a companion animal, methods for preventing or treating an oral disease or condition in a companion animal, and kits for identifying a companion animal as being at risk of an oral disease or condition.

abstract: Disclosed are a method and apparatus for determining depression and analyzing mental health based on multimodal AI. The apparatus includes a multimodal data collection unit that collects multimodal data including voice data, text data recognized from the verbal output, and ECG data of a user, a depression state determination unit that outputs depression state data indicating a depression state of the user by using an AI model based on the multimodal data, a medical data and biometric information association unit that collects a physical health index by associating biometric information including medical data, blood pressure, body composition measurements, and arrhythmia measurement results of the user, a mental health analysis unit that generates mental health analysis results from the multimodal data, the depression state data, and the physical health index by using LLM, and an analysis result generation unit that visually provides the user with the mental health analysis results.

title: PROCEDURE FOR OBTAINING AN EXTRACT FROM MATURE CONIFER CONES WITH SIMULTANEOUS ANTIOXIDANT, ANTIMICROBIAL, AND PREBIOTIC POTENTIAL
assignee: TEHNOLOSKO METALURSKI FAKULTET UNIVERZITET U BEOGRADU [RS]; TEHNOLOŠKO-METALURŠKI FAKULTET, UNIVERZITET U BEOGRADU

abstract: The subject invention describes a process for obtaining potent plant preparations that includes extracting compounds from mature conifer cones with simultaneous antioxidant, antimicrobial, and prebiotic potential. Through the extraction process, for example, using microwave extraction and solvents like ethanol, preparations with a high content of total polyphenols, flavonoids, tannins, and terpenoids, and significant antioxidant activity (expressed as DPPH radical inhibition or as the ability of the extracts to reduce Fe3+ to Fe2+) can be obtained. These extracts also possess the ability to completely inhibit the growth of harmful bacteria, such as some Gram-positive bacteria like Staphylococcus aureus, and significantly inhibit pathogenic fungi, for example, Candida albicans, while either not affecting or slightly increasing the number of beneficial bacteria species from the genus Lactobacillus, such as the commercial probiotics Lactobacillus rhamnosus LGG and Lactobacillus plantarum 299v. Additionally, the potent plant extracts derived from mature conifer cones show little to no cytotoxicity on human fibroblast cells.

title: WIND TURBINE

abstract: The invention relates to a turbine (1) for converting wind energy into rotational mechanical work. The turbine has an axis (2) and at least a first (3, 4) and a second (5, 6) set of vanes mounted on the axis in an adjacent sequence. Each set of vanes comprises two vanes being in line with each other and pointing in opposite directions with respect to the axis. According to the invention, the first set of vanes (3, 4) and the second set of vanes (5, 6) are mounted mutually perpendicular on the turbine axis, and each vane comprises an inner portion (3A – 6A) and an outer portion (3B – 6B) which is curved or bent with respect to the inner portion. The curved or bent outer portion (3B – 6B) is further being inclined with respect to the inner portion (3A – 6A) in a fashion to direct wind diverted from the first set of vanes (3, 4) to be captured by the second set of vanes (5, 6), or vice versa.

title: METHOD OF PROCESSING BRAIN SIGNALS
assignee: LLC NEUROSPUTNIK [RU]; ОБЩЕСТВО С ОГРАНИЧЕННОЙ ОТВЕТСТВЕННОСТЬЮ "НЕЙРОСПУТНИК"

matched_tags: Gut health microbiome probiotic formulation
abstract: The invention relates to methods for detecting brain states by reading bioelectrical data. To determine a similarity between a person's brain states at different times, received signals are assessed for the presence or absence of an information component in common with signals corresponding to specific brain states. Brain signals are received by means of brain-computer interface sensors arranged on the head. The received signals are digitized, and the digitized signal of each sensor is converted into a topological space object. The converted signals are assessed to establish whether they belong to a pre-constructed topological space for a specific brain state, wherein if a converted signal belongs to such a topological space, said signal has an information component in common with the signal for the corresponding brain state, and the state of the brain under examination is similar to said state. The technical result is that of enabling faster and more informative detection of a common information component while maintaining high accuracy, allowing real-time assessment of the similarity of a state of a brain under examination with a specific state in a database of states.

abstract: Presented herein are systems and methods of identifying locations to place stereo-electroencephalography (SEEG) electrodes on brain tissues of subjects for detection of epileptogenic zones (EZs). A computing system may receive, for a subject at risk of or diagnosed with epilepsy, a dataset comprising a neuroimage of the brain of the subject and a metric indicating a degree of neuropsychological function of the subject. The computing system may apply the dataset to a machine learning (ML) model. The computing system may generate a plurality of coordinates for a corresponding plurality of locations along a brain tissue of the subject, each of the plurality of coordinates identifying a plurality of locations at which to place a plurality of SEEG electrodes on the brain tissue to detect an EZ within the subject.

title: Gym barbell with three-axis rotatable handles
